data.title: Write structural RED tests for brainstorm SKILL.md Shape Heuristic sub-step
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh with 4 structural boundary tests (Rule 5) that will FAIL (RED) because the Shape Heuristic sub-step does not yet exist in brainstorm SKILL.md.

## Tests to Write (structural boundary per Rule 5)

1. test_skill_md_has_shape_heuristic_section: grep -q 'Shape Heuristic Scan' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — fails before T4
2. test_skill_md_references_classify_script: grep -q 'classify-sc-shape.sh' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — fails before T4
3. test_skill_md_references_contract_doc: grep -q 'external-dependencies-block.md' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — fails before T4
4. test_skill_md_references_planning_flag: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled\|is_external_dep_block_enabled\|planning-config.sh' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — fails before T4

The first test (test_skill_md_has_shape_heuristic_section) must be the first function defined.

Add RED marker to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh [test_skill_md_has_shape_heuristic_section]

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: RED, Rule 5 exemption — structural boundary tests for non-executable instruction file)
All 4 tests fail before T4 because the sections do not exist in SKILL.md yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh
- Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh
- Verify: shellcheck tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ] (RED — fails as expected)
- Verify: grep 'test_skill_md_has_shape_heuristic_section' .test-index (RED marker present)
